docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,688.00 FILED BY APPMAIL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEAD MARKET INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APPMAIL, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEAD MARKET INC PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE THAT DEFENDANT VIOLATED TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
